failure_reasons: insufficient_sample_size: tested 9 observations, need at least 10 for statistical significance
tautology_risk: 100.0% success rate on 9 observations - likely circular logic or self-evident condition
tautology: condition 'price anomaly' and success_criteria 'measurable_impact' are semantically equivalent - measuring the same thing twice
non_specific_condition: 'price anomaly' is too vague - must be measurable and objective (e.g. 'funding_rate > 0.015')
non_specific_success_criteria: 'measurable_impact' is too vague - must define measurable threshold (e.g. 'vol_spike_2x_baseline')
what_needs_fixing: Increase lookback_period to get 10+ observations. Current lookback: 30 days
suggested_next_test: Extend lookback_period to 60 days or find more frequent observation type.

failure_reasons: tautology: condition 'price anomaly' and success_criteria 'measurable_impact' are semantically equivalent - measuring the same thing twice
non_specific_condition: 'price anomaly' is too vague - must be measurable and objective (e.g. 'funding_rate > 0.015')
non_specific_success_criteria: 'measurable_impact' is too vague - must define measurable threshold (e.g. 'vol_spike_2x_baseline')
what_needs_fixing: Redesign test to use future outcome, not circular logic. Condition must be observable BEFORE outcome measurement.
suggested_next_test: Define: specific condition at time T, specific measurable outcome at T+X. Use lookforward_window with X > 1 hour.
